```{r isopair-example-genes}
  chevrons <- bind_rows(lapply(ISOFORMS, function(iso) make_chevrons(introns[introns$isoform_id==iso,], strand)))

  regs <- bind_rows(lapply(ISOFORMS, function(iso){ s<-structures[structures$isoform_id==iso,]
    data.frame(isoform_id=iso, xmin=s$exon_starts[[1]], xmax=s$exon_ends[[1]]) }))
  regs$y_center <- y_centers[regs$isoform_id]
  regs$nmd_class <- iso_status$nmd_class[match(regs$isoform_id, iso_status$isoform_id)]
  regs$ymin <- regs$y_center - EXON_HALFH; regs$ymax <- regs$y_center + EXON_HALFH

  x_min<-min(regs$xmin); x_max<-max(regs$xmax); x_buf<-max((x_max-x_min)*0.04,50)
  label_df <- tibble(x=x_min-x_buf*1.5, y=y_centers[ISOFORMS], isoform_id=ISOFORMS) %>%
    left_join(iso_status %>% select(isoform_id,nmd_class), by="isoform_id") %>% mutate(label=isoform_id)

  p_A <- ggplot() +
    { if (nrow(introns)) geom_segment(data=introns, aes(x,xend=xend,y=y,yend=yend), color="gray55", linewidth=0.4) } +
    { if (!is.null(chevrons)&&nrow(chevrons)) geom_segment(data=chevrons, aes(x,xend=xend,y=y,yend=yend), color="gray55", linewidth=0.3) } +
    geom_rect(data=regs, aes(xmin=xmin,xmax=xmax,ymin=ymin,ymax=ymax,fill=nmd_class), color="black", linewidth=0.3) +
    scale_fill_manual(values=PAL_NMD, breaks=c("Unproductive","Productive"), name=NULL) +
    geom_text(data=label_df, aes(x,y,label=label,colour=nmd_class), hjust=1, size=3.0, fontface="bold") +
    scale_colour_manual(values=PAL_NMD, guide="none") +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks=NULL, limits=c(min(y_centers)-0.5, max(y_centers)+0.5)) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim=c(x_min-x_buf*4, x_max+x_buf), clip="off") +
    labs(x=sprintf("Genomic position (%s strand)", strand), y=NULL,
         title=sprintf("%s isoforms — structure and NMD status in %s", EXAMPLE_GENE, ctd)) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y=element_blank(), panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
          legend.position="bottom", plot.title=element_text(size=HEADER,face="bold"),
          plot.margin=margin(5,10,5,110))

  cpmL <- edgeR::cpm(counts_iso[ISOFORMS, cs, drop=FALSE], log=TRUE, prior.count=1)
  dcols <- cs[samples[cs,"treatment"]=="DMSO"]; scols <- cs[samples[cs,"treatment"]=="Smg1i"]
  expr <- data.frame(isoform_id=rownames(cpmL),
                     DMSO=rowMeans(cpmL[,dcols,drop=FALSE]),
                     Smg1i=rowMeans(cpmL[,scols,drop=FALSE])) %>%
    mutate(isoform_id=factor(isoform_id, levels=rev(ISOFORMS)))
  expr_long <- expr %>% pivot_longer(c(DMSO,Smg1i), names_to="treatment", values_to="log2cpm")
  yax_col <- PAL_NMD[iso_status$nmd_class[match(rev(ISOFORMS), iso_status$isoform_id)]]
  p_B <- ggplot() +
    geom_segment(data=expr, aes(x=DMSO,xend=Smg1i,y=isoform_id,yend=isoform_id), color="grey70", linewidth=0.8) +
    geom_point(data=expr_long, aes(log2cpm,isoform_id,color=treatment), size=3) +
    scale_color_manual(values=TREAT_COL, name=NULL) +
    labs(x="log2(CPM)", y=NULL, title=paste0(EXAMPLE_GENE," expression in ",ctd),
         subtitle="TMM-normalised; mean DMSO vs Smg1i") +
    theme_minimal(base_size=BODY) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y=element_blank(),
          legend.position="top", plot.title=element_text(face="bold",size=HEADER),
          plot.subtitle=element_text(color="gray30",size=BODY), axis.text.y=element_text(color=yax_col))

  donors <- unique(samples[cs,"sample_id"])
  cpm_lin <- edgeR::cpm(counts_iso[, cs, drop=FALSE], log=FALSE)
  fc <- bind_rows(lapply(ISOFORMS, function(iso){
    v <- vapply(donors, function(d){
      dc <- rownames(samples)[samples$cell_type==EXAMPLE_CT & samples$sample_id==d & samples$treatment=="DMSO"]
      sc <- rownames(samples)[samples$cell_type==EXAMPLE_CT & samples$sample_id==d & samples$treatment=="Smg1i"]
      if (length(dc)!=1 || length(sc)!=1) return(NA_real_)
      log2((cpm_lin[iso,sc]+1)/(cpm_lin[iso,dc]+1)) }, numeric(1))
    v <- v[is.finite(v)]
    data.frame(isoform_id=iso, logFC=mean(v), se=ifelse(length(v)>1, sd(v)/sqrt(length(v)), NA), n=length(v)) })) %>%
    left_join(iso_status %>% select(isoform_id, nmd_class, lfsr), by="isoform_id") %>%
    mutate(CI.L=logFC-1.96*se, CI.R=logFC+1.96*se,
           isoform_id=factor(isoform_id, levels=rev(ISOFORMS)), sig=lfsr<0.05)
  p_C <- ggplot(fc, aes(logFC, isoform_id)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=0, color="grey60", linetype="dashed") +
    geom_pointrange(aes(xmin=CI.L, xmax=CI.R, color=nmd_class, shape=sig), size=0.5, linewidth=0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values=PAL_NMD, name=NULL) +
    scale_shape_manual(values=c(`TRUE`=16,`FALSE`=1), breaks=c("TRUE","FALSE"),
                       labels=c("lfsr < 0.05","n.s."), name=NULL) +
    labs(x="Smg1i log2 fold-change (donor-paired, 95% CI)", y=NULL,
         title=paste0("Smg1i effect on ",EXAMPLE_GENE," (",ctd,")"),
         subtitle="per-isoform, donor-paired; colored by NMD class") +
    theme_minimal(base_size=BODY) +
    theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(), panel.grid.major.y=element_blank(),
          legend.position="top", plot.title=element_text(face="bold",size=HEADER),
          plot.subtitle=element_text(color="gray30",size=BODY))

  bottom <- (p_B + labs(title=NULL,subtitle=NULL)) +
            (p_C + labs(title=NULL,subtitle=NULL) +
               theme(axis.text.y=element_blank(), axis.ticks.y=element_blank())) +
            plot_layout(widths=c(1.25,1))
  combined <- (p_A + labs(title=NULL,subtitle=NULL)) / bottom +
    plot_layout(heights=c(1.55,1)) +
    plot_annotation(tag_levels="A",
      title=sprintf("%s in %s", EXAMPLE_GENE, ctd), subtitle=FIG_SUB) &
    theme(plot.tag=element_text(face="bold",size=TAG_SIZE),
          plot.title=element_text(face="bold",size=HEADER),
          plot.subtitle=element_text(color="gray30",size=BODY),
          plot.background=element_rect(color="grey25",fill=NA,linewidth=0.5),
          plot.margin=margin(6,6,6,6))

  ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR_EX, sprintf("FIG_%s_%s.pdf", EXAMPLE_GENE, EXAMPLE_CT)),
         combined, width=13, height=9, units="in")
  ggsave(file.path(OUT_DIR_EX, sprintf("FIG_%s_%s.png", EXAMPLE_GENE, EXAMPLE_CT)),
         combined, width=13, height=9, units="in", dpi=300)
  print(combined)
  cat(sprintf("Saved %s (%s): %d isoforms (%d unproductive)\n",
              EXAMPLE_GENE, ctd, nrow(iso_status), sum(iso_status$nmd_class=="Unproductive")))
  invisible(combined)
}

for (i in seq_len(nrow(EXAMPLES)))
  make_example_fig(EXAMPLES$gene[i], EXAMPLES$ct[i], EXAMPLES$subtitle[i])
```

```{r specific-splicing}
splice_set <- go_to_symbols(c("GO:0008380","GO:0000380","GO:0043484"))   # RNA splicing + reg. of AS
sf_curated <- c(paste0("SRSF",1:12),
                paste0("HNRNP",c("A1","A2B1","A3","C","D","F","H1","K","L","M","U")),
                "TRA2A","TRA2B","RBM39","PTBP1","PTBP2","RBFOX2","CELF1","MBNL1")

enrich_down_byset <- function(set,label) dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(CELL_TYPES,function(ct_i)
  dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(MAIN_CATS,function(cl){
    d   <- dplyr::filter(prod_dir_mashr, ct==ct_i, gene_category==cl)
    hit <- unique(d$hgnc_symbol[d$dir=="down"]); bg <- unique(d$hgnc_symbol)
    ft  <- safe_fisher(bg %in% hit, bg %in% set)
    data.frame(set=label, ct=ct_i, class=cl, n_down=length(hit),
               n_down_in_set=sum(hit %in% set),
               OR=round(as.numeric(ft$estimate),2), p=signif(ft$p.value,3)) }))))
kable(enrich_down_byset(splice_set,"RNA splicing (GO)"),
      caption="Splicing-regulation genes enriched among productive-DOWN genes (one-sided Fisher).")
kable(enrich_down_byset(sf_curated,"SR/hnRNP curated"),
      caption="Curated SR/hnRNP factors enriched among productive-DOWN genes.")

kable(prod_dir_mashr %>% dplyr::filter(hgnc_symbol %in% paste0("SRSF",1:12)) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(ct) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(n_SR_tested=dplyr::n_distinct(hgnc_symbol),
                  n_SR_down=dplyr::n_distinct(hgnc_symbol[dir=="down"]),
                  n_SR_up=dplyr::n_distinct(hgnc_symbol[dir=="up"]), .groups="drop"),
      caption="Canonical SR proteins (SRSF1-12): productive direction per cell type.")

kable(base %>% dplyr::filter(hgnc_symbol %in% sf_curated) %>%
        dplyr::group_by(ct) %>%
        dplyr::summarise(n=dplyr::n(), median_custom=round(median(custom),3),
                  pct_down_0.3=round(100*mean(custom < -DROP_THR),1),
                  wilcox_p=signif(suppressWarnings(wilcox.test(custom)$p.value),3), .groups="drop"),
      caption="Productive log2FC of curated splicing factors per CT (median; Wilcoxon vs 0).")
```

# SUPPLEMENT

## S0 — The uncertain group on every distribution

```{r S0-unsure-dists, fig.height=4}
ALL3 <- c("NMD","non-NMD","unsure")
print(plot_dist(base, "custom",          "Adjusted productive log2FC — incl. unsure", xlab="productive log2 fold-change (adjusted)", cats=ALL3, xlim=c(-2,2), vline=0))
print(plot_dist(base, "prod_shift_adj",  "Productive-only output shift (neg = lower in SMG1i) — incl. unsure", xlab="change in productive output (fraction of DMSO gene total)", cats=ALL3, xlim=c(-0.5,0.5), vline=0))
print(plot_dist(base, "prodfrac_change", "Productive-SHARE change (incl. surge) — incl. unsure", xlab="change in productive fraction of the gene", cats=ALL3, xlim=c(-0.75,0.5), vline=0))
print(plot_dist(base, "prodCPM_DMSO",    "DMSO productive CPM — incl. unsure",         xlab="productive CPM (DMSO)", cats=ALL3, logx=TRUE))
print(plot_dist(base, "prodCPM_SMG_adj", "Adjusted SMG1i productive CPM — incl. unsure", xlab="productive CPM (SMG1i, adjusted)", cats=ALL3, logx=TRUE))
kable(med_tab(base, "custom", cats=ALL3), caption="TABLE S0. Adjusted productive log2FC including the unsure group.")
```

```{r S0-unsure-box, fig.height=4}
g3 <- base %>% mutate(gene_category=factor(gene_category, levels=c("NMD","unsure","non-NMD")))
print(ggplot(g3, aes(gene_category, custom, fill=gene_category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, colour="grey40") +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size=0.3, outlier.alpha=0.2, width=0.65, colour="grey25") +
  facet_wrap(~ct, nrow=1) + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-1.2,1.2)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=cat_colors, guide="none") +
  labs(x=NULL, y="productive log2FC (custom)", title="FIGURE S0. Including the uncertain group") +
  theme_bw(base_size=11) + theme(strip.background=element_rect(fill="grey92")))
```

## S1 — Concordance: custom vs raw (Kitagawa)

```{r S1-concordance, fig.height=4}
agree <- base %>% filter(gene_category %in% MAIN_CATS) %>% group_by(ct) %>%
  summarise(n=n(), pearson=round(cor(custom, Kitagawa),3),
            spearman=round(cor(custom, Kitagawa, method="spearman"),3),
            median_custom_minus_Kitagawa=round(median(custom-Kitagawa),3), .groups="drop")
kable(agree, caption="TABLE S1. Per-gene agreement between custom and raw (Kitagawa).")
print(ggplot(base %>% filter(gene_category %in% MAIN_CATS), aes(Kitagawa, custom, colour=gene_category)) +
  geom_abline(slope=1, intercept=0, linetype="dashed", colour="grey50") +
  geom_point(alpha=0.1, size=0.4) + facet_wrap(~ct, nrow=1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim=c(-1.5,1.5), ylim=c(-1.5,1.5)) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=cat_colors, name=NULL) +
  labs(title="FIGURE S1. custom vs Kitagawa per gene (dashed = identity)") +
  theme_bw(base_size=11) + theme(strip.background=element_rect(fill="grey92"), legend.position="top"))
```

## S2 — Down-isoform genes

```{r S2-down, fig.height=4.5}
down_tab <- bind_rows(lapply(CELL_TYPES, function(ct) data.frame(ct=ct, gene_id=down_iso_genes(ct), stringsAsFactors=FALSE)))
grp_dn <- bind_rows(
  base %>% transmute(ct, custom, group=gene_category),
  base %>% inner_join(down_tab, by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>% transmute(ct, custom, group="down-isoform")
) %>% mutate(group=factor(group, levels=c("NMD","unsure","non-NMD","down-isoform")))
kable(grp_dn %>% group_by(ct, group) %>%
        summarise(n=n(), median_custom=round(median(custom),3),
                  pct_down_0.3=round(100*mean(custom < -DROP_THR),1), .groups="drop") %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from=group, values_from=c(n, median_custom, pct_down_0.3)),
      caption="TABLE S2. Productive change for categories + the down-isoform group (overlapping membership).")
ov_tab <- bind_rows(lapply(CELL_TYPES, function(ct){
  dn <- down_iso_genes(ct); nm <- nmd_iso_genes(ct); k <- length(intersect(dn, nm))
  data.frame(ct=ct, n_down_gene=length(dn), n_down_with_NMD_iso=k,
             pct_with_NMD_iso=round(100*k/length(dn),1), n_down_only=length(setdiff(dn,nm)))
}))
kable(ov_tab, caption="TABLE S2b. Of down-isoform genes, fraction also carrying an NMD (up) isoform vs down-only.")
```

```{r S2-down-topgo, eval = requireNamespace("topGO", quietly=TRUE) && requireNamespace("org.Hs.eg.db", quietly=TRUE)}
if (exists("run_bp")) for (ct_i in CELL_TYPES){
  uni <- base$gene_id[base$ct==ct_i]
  run_bp(uni, intersect(down_iso_genes(ct_i), uni), sprintf("down-isoform | %s (all)", ct_i))
  run_bp(uni, intersect(setdiff(down_iso_genes(ct_i), nmd_iso_genes(ct_i)), uni),
         sprintf("down-isoform | %s (down-only)", ct_i))
}
```

## S3 — Where do short-read DOWN-regulated genes land? (split by NMD-isoform status)

```{r S3-sr-down-split, fig.height=4.5}
sr_down <- sr_long %>% filter(!is.na(sr_lfsr), !is.na(sr_logFC), sr_lfsr<0.05, sr_logFC<0) %>%
  select(ct, gene_id) %>% distinct()
nmd_iso_tab <- bind_rows(lapply(CELL_TYPES, function(ct) data.frame(ct=ct, gene_id=nmd_iso_genes(ct), stringsAsFactors=FALSE)))
sr_down_split <- sr_down %>%
  mutate(has_nmd_iso = paste(ct,gene_id) %in% paste(nmd_iso_tab$ct, nmd_iso_tab$gene_id)) %>%
  mutate(group = ifelse(has_nmd_iso, "SR-down (NMD-iso)", "SR-down (no NMD-iso)"))
grp_sr <- bind_rows(
  base %>% filter(gene_category %in% MAIN_CATS) %>% transmute(ct, custom, group=gene_category),
  base %>% inner_join(sr_down_split %>% select(ct, gene_id, group), by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
    transmute(ct, custom, group)
) %>% mutate(group=factor(group, levels=c("NMD","non-NMD","SR-down (NMD-iso)","SR-down (no NMD-iso)")))
kable(grp_sr %>% group_by(ct, group) %>%
        summarise(n=n(), median_custom=round(median(custom),3),
                  pct_down_0.3=round(100*mean(custom < -DROP_THR),1), .groups="drop") %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from=group, values_from=c(n, median_custom, pct_down_0.3)),
      caption="TABLE S3. SR-down genes split by NMD-isoform status vs NMD and non-NMD baselines.")
print(ggplot(grp_sr, aes(group, custom, fill=group)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, colour="grey40") +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.size=0.3, outlier.alpha=0.2, width=0.6, colour="grey25") +
  facet_wrap(~ct, nrow=1) + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-1.5,1.5)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("NMD"="#c0392b","non-NMD"="#7f8c8d",
                             "SR-down (NMD-iso)"="#8e44ad","SR-down (no NMD-iso)"="#2980b9"), guide="none") +
  labs(x=NULL, y="productive log2FC (custom)", title="FIGURE S3. SR down-regulated genes, split by NMD-isoform status") +
  theme_bw(base_size=11) + theme(strip.background=element_rect(fill="grey92"), axis.text.x=element_text(angle=20, hjust=1)))
```

```{r S3-sr-down-topgo, eval = requireNamespace("topGO", quietly=TRUE) && requireNamespace("org.Hs.eg.db", quietly=TRUE)}
if (exists("run_bp")) for (ct_i in CELL_TYPES){
  uni <- base$gene_id[base$ct==ct_i]
  run_bp(uni, intersect(sr_down_split$gene_id[sr_down_split$ct==ct_i & sr_down_split$has_nmd_iso],  uni), sprintf("SR-down NMD-iso | %s", ct_i))
  run_bp(uni, intersect(sr_down_split$gene_id[sr_down_split$ct==ct_i & !sr_down_split$has_nmd_iso], uni), sprintf("SR-down no-NMD-iso | %s", ct_i))
}
```

## S4 — Per-donor productive change with error bars

```{r S4-perdonor-candidate, fig.height=4}
perdonor <- gene_sample %>%
  filter(gene_category %in% MAIN_CATS, !is.na(prodCPM_DMSO), !is.na(prodCPM_SMG_adj)) %>%
  mutate(custom_d = log2((prodCPM_SMG_adj+1)/(prodCPM_DMSO+1)))
pd_sum <- perdonor %>% group_by(ct, donor, gene_category) %>%
  summarise(median_custom=median(custom_d, na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
print(ggplot(pd_sum, aes(gene_category, median_custom, colour=gene_category)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, colour="grey70") +
  geom_point(position=position_jitter(width=0.12), size=2, alpha=0.8) +
  stat_summary(fun=median, geom="crossbar", width=0.5, colour="black", linewidth=0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ct, nrow=1) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=cat_colors, guide="none") +
  labs(x=NULL, y="per-donor median productive log2FC (custom)",
       title="S4. Per-donor productive change (each point = one donor)") +
  theme_bw(base_size=11) + theme(strip.background=element_rect(fill="grey92")))
```

## S5 — Kitagawa on all significant NMD genes (FB excluded)

```{r kitagawa-on-all}
# General Kitagawa result: all significant NMD genes (up or down), mashr-called (AT2/LAE/MV)
kit_nmd_table() %>% dplyr::count(driver) %>% dplyr::mutate(pct = round(100*n/sum(n),1))
```

## S6 — Productive-DOWN: does it co-occur with a down-isoform, and which mechanism?

```{r check-die-down}
prod_down <- prod_dir_mashr %>% dplyr::filter(dir=="down") %>%
  dplyr::select(ct, gene_id) %>% dplyr::distinct() %>% dplyr::mutate(prod_down=TRUE)
down_iso <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(CELL_TYPES, function(ct)
  data.frame(ct=ct, gene_id=down_iso_genes(ct), down_iso=TRUE)))

cmp_di <- prod_dir_mashr %>% dplyr::select(ct, gene_id) %>% dplyr::distinct() %>%
  dplyr::left_join(prod_down, by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(down_iso,  by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(prod_down=!is.na(prod_down), down_iso=!is.na(down_iso))

xtab <- dplyr::bind_rows(lapply(CELL_TYPES, function(ct_i){
  d <- cmp_di %>% dplyr::filter(ct==ct_i)
  ft <- fisher.test(table(factor(d$prod_down,c(F,T)), factor(d$down_iso,c(F,T))), alternative="greater")
  data.frame(ct=ct_i, n=nrow(d),
             prod_down=sum(d$prod_down), down_iso=sum(d$down_iso),
             both=sum(d$prod_down & d$down_iso),
             prod_down_only=sum(d$prod_down & !d$down_iso),
             down_iso_only=sum(!d$prod_down & d$down_iso),
             pct_proddown_with_downiso=round(100*mean(d$down_iso[d$prod_down]),1),
             OR=round(as.numeric(ft$estimate),2), p=signif(ft$p.value,3))
}))
print(xtab, row.names=FALSE)

mech <- cmp_di %>% dplyr::filter(prod_down) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(base %>% dplyr::select(ct,gene_id,unprod_gain,custom,prodfrac_DMSO,prodfrac_SMG),
                   by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(sr_long %>% dplyr::select(ct,gene_id,sr_logFC), by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(group=ifelse(down_iso,"prod-down WITH down-isoform","prod-down WITHOUT down-isoform")) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(group) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(n=dplyr::n(),
            median_sr_logFC=round(median(sr_logFC,na.rm=TRUE),2),
            median_unprod_gain=round(median(unprod_gain,na.rm=TRUE),2),
            median_prodfrac_drop=round(median(prodfrac_SMG-prodfrac_DMSO,na.rm=TRUE),3),
            .groups="drop")
print(mech, row.names=FALSE)
```

## S6b — Down-arm mechanism split (transcriptional vs composition; AT2/LAE/MV)

```{r down-arm-mechanism}
# classify productive-down genes once (FB excluded: provisional CT)
pd_mech <- prod_dir_mashr %>% dplyr::filter(dir=="down", ct != "FB") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(base %>% dplyr::select(ct,gene_id,prodfrac_DMSO,prodfrac_SMG), by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(sr_long %>% dplyr::select(ct,gene_id,sr_logFC), by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  classify_mech("down")
cat("Down-arm mechanism split:\n")
print(pd_mech %>% dplyr::count(mechanism) %>% dplyr::mutate(pct = round(100*n/sum(n),1)))

trans_g    <- pd_mech %>% dplyr::filter(mechanism=="transcriptional") %>% dplyr::pull(gene_id) %>% unique()
comp_g     <- pd_mech %>% dplyr::filter(mechanism=="composition")     %>% dplyr::pull(gene_id) %>% unique()
universe_g <- unique(prod_dir_mashr$gene_id[prod_dir_mashr$ct != "FB"])
cat(sprintf("transcriptional=%d | composition=%d | universe=%d\n", length(trans_g), length(comp_g), length(universe_g)))
cat("\nTheme enrichment: transcriptional vs composition productive-down genes\n")
print(theme_enrichment(trans_g, comp_g, universe_g), row.names=FALSE)
if (exists("run_bp")) { run_bp(universe_g, trans_g, "TRANSCRIPTIONAL productive-down (GO BP)")
                        run_bp(universe_g, comp_g,  "COMPOSITION productive-down (GO BP)") }
```

```{r kitagawa-proof}
# Kitagawa driver split by direction (AT2/LAE/MV)
kit_nmd_table() %>% dplyr::count(dir, driver) %>%
  dplyr::group_by(dir) %>% dplyr::mutate(pct=round(100*n/sum(n),1)) %>% dplyr::ungroup()
```

## S7 — Up-arm mechanism split + decomposition + theme enrichment

```{r up-arm-stuff}
## ---- 1) mechanism classification of productive-UP genes (AT2/LAE/MV) ----
pu <- prod_dir_mashr %>% dplyr::filter(dir=="up", ct != "FB") %>%
  dplyr::left_join(base %>% dplyr::select(ct,gene_id,prodfrac_DMSO,prodfrac_SMG), by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  dplyr::left_join(sr_long %>% dplyr::select(ct,gene_id,sr_logFC), by=c("ct","gene_id")) %>%
  classify_mech("up")
cat("Up-arm mechanism split:\n")
print(pu %>% dplyr::count(mechanism) %>% dplyr::mutate(pct = round(100*n/sum(n),1)))

## ---- 2) Kitagawa decomposition on productive-UP genes ----
cat("\nKitagawa decomposition (productive-UP):\n")
print(kit_nmd_table() %>% dplyr::filter(dir=="up") %>%
  dplyr::count(driver) %>% dplyr::mutate(pct=round(100*n/sum(n),1)))

## ---- 3) theme enrichment: transcriptional-up vs composition-up ----
trans_g    <- pu %>% dplyr::filter(mechanism=="transcriptional") %>% dplyr::pull(gene_id) %>% unique()
comp_g     <- pu %>% dplyr::filter(mechanism=="composition")     %>% dplyr::pull(gene_id) %>% unique()
universe_g <- unique(prod_dir_mashr$gene_id[prod_dir_mashr$ct != "FB"])
cat(sprintf("\ntranscriptional-up=%d | composition-up=%d | universe=%d\n", length(trans_g), length(comp_g), length(universe_g)))
# up arm adds the NF-kB set to the shared theme list
sets_up <- c(THEME_SETS, list("NF-kB/TNFA (GO)" = go_to_symbols(c("GO:0051092","GO:0034612"))))
cat("\nTheme enrichment: transcriptional-up vs composition-up\n")
print(theme_enrichment(trans_g, comp_g, universe_g, sets_up), row.names=FALSE)
if (exists("run_bp")) { run_bp(universe_g, trans_g, "TRANSCRIPTIONAL productive-UP (GO BP)")
  if (length(comp_g) >= 5) run_bp(universe_g, comp_g, "COMPOSITION productive-UP (GO BP)")
  else cat(sprintf("\nComposition-up group too small for topGO (n=%d)\n", length(comp_g))) }
```

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
